title: Positive flow: User selects gender and proceeds to next step
test_steps: Click on the 'I am male' toggle button. | Click on the 'I am female' toggle button. | Click on the progress indicator to proceed to the next step.
expected_result: The gender selection is confirmed. | The progress indicator advances to the next step.

title: Negative flow: User attempts to proceed without selecting gender
test_steps: Click on the progress indicator without selecting a gender.
expected_result: An error message or prompt is displayed, indicating that a gender selection is required.

title: Boundary validation: User selects both genders
test_steps: Click on the 'I am male' toggle button. | Click on the 'I am female' toggle button.
expected_result: An error message or prompt is displayed, indicating that only one gender can be selected.

title: Navigation: User skips the current step
test_steps: Click on the 'Skip' button on the right side of the progress indicator.
expected_result: The user is redirected to the next step in the onboarding process.

title: Usability: User navigates back to the previous step
test_steps: Click on the progress indicator to navigate back to the previous step.
expected_result: The user is redirected to the previous step in the onboarding process.
